title: Tulangan Utara Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tulangan Utara with a Z-Score of +3.94. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tulangan Utara is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and the wind speed is approximately 1.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of significant wind and high humidity is contributing to the severe heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the public.
